title: dianthus × borderei var. insignitus
intro: Dianthus × borderei var. insignitus, also known as Cheddar Pink or Bowles's Double Red, is a variety of flowering plant in the carnation family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and coughs, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The herbal preparations of Dianthus × borderei var. insignitus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to soothe sore throats and calm digestive issues.
